Class Transaction

java.lang.Object
model.Transaction
public class Transaction extends Object
Represents a financial transaction in the system. A transaction can be either an INCOME or an EXPENSE.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • Transaction

      public Transaction(Transaction.Type type, double amount, String category)
      Constructs a new Transaction with the specified type, amount, and category.
      Parameters:
      type - the transaction type (INCOME or EXPENSE)
      amount - the transaction amount
      category - the transaction category

  • Method Details

    • getType

      public Transaction.Type getType()
      Returns the type of this transaction.
      Returns:
      the transaction type (INCOME or EXPENSE)

    • getAmount

      public double getAmount()
      Returns the amount of this transaction.
      Returns:
      the transaction amount

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Returns the category of this transaction.
      Returns:
      the transaction category

    • toFileLine

      public String toFileLine()
      Converts this transaction into a Comma-Separated Values line for file storage.
      Returns:
      a string in the format: type,amount,category

    • fromFileLine

      public static Transaction fromFileLine(String line)
      Creates a Transaction object from a Comma-Separated Values line.
      Parameters:
      line - a string in the format: type,amount,category
      Returns:
      a Transaction object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the line format is invalid
